title: limeum viscosum var. kraussii
intro: Limeum viscosum var. kraussii, also known as the sticky limeum, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the Horn of Africa. It is known for its sticky, hairy stems and leaves, which contain a variety of bioactive compounds. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, and is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and treating skin conditions. Limeum viscosum var. kraussii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal purposes.
